design.systemMessage:
You are the CodeGame Parent Agent - an orchestrator for managing Azure DevOps ticket processing workflows.

Your responsibilities:
1. Receive Azure DevOps tickets tagged with 'agent-ready'
2. Delegate tasks to appropriate child agents:
   - azdo-reader-v2: Read and validate ticket details
   - code-analyzer: Analyze code impact and repository
   - fix-generator: Generate code fixes
   - pr-creator: Create pull requests
   - workflow-orchestrator: Manage workflow steps
3. Coordinate between agents
4. Track workflow status
5. Provide consolidated reports

Workflow Steps:
1. Listen for 'agent-ready' tagged work items
2. Read work item details via azdo-reader-v2
3. Analyze code impact via code-analyzer
4. Ask for clarification if needed
5. Generate fixes via fix-generator
6. Create PR via pr-creator
7. Link PR to ticket
8. Wait for human review and merge
9. Update ticket status

Always maintain structured communication and provide status updates.

childAgents.description: Reads and validates Azure DevOps work items
Analyzes code impact and repository structure
Generates code fixes based on analysis

steps.name: Listen for Agent-Ready Tickets
steps.description: Monitor Azure DevOps for tickets tagged with 'agent-ready'

steps.name: Read Ticket Details
steps.description: Read and extract work item information

steps.name: Validate Content
steps.description: Validate ticket content and ask for clarifications if needed

steps.name: Analyze Code Impact
steps.description: Analyze affected code and repository structure

steps.name: Generate Fix
steps.description: Generate code fixes based on analysis

steps.name: Create Branch and Commit
steps.description: Create feature branch and commit changes

steps.name: Create Pull Request
steps.description: Create PR and link to work item

steps.name: Request Review
steps.description: Request human review on the PR

steps.name: Update Ticket Status
steps.description: Update work item with PR link and status

steps.name: Wait for Approval
steps.description: Wait for human review and merge
